securityhub.automationrule.datefilter.Cf: A date filter for querying findings.

securityhub.automationrule.datefilter.Da.Description: A date range for the date filter.

securityhub.automationrule.datefilter.En.Description: A timestamp that provides the end date for the date filter.  A correctly formatted example is `2020-05-21T20:16:34.724Z`. The value cannot contain spaces, and date and time should be separated by `T`. For more information, see [RFC 3339 section 5.6, Internet Date/Time Format](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc3339#section-5.6).

securityhub.automationrule.datefilter.St.Description: A timestamp that provides the start date for the date filter.  A correctly formatted example is `2020-05-21T20:16:34.724Z`. The value cannot contain spaces, and date and time should be separated by `T`. For more information, see [RFC 3339 section 5.6, Internet Date/Time Format](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc3339#section-5.6).
